## Blueprint checklist
- [ ] CLAUDE.md has all 14 required sections
- [ ] SESH.md contract specified
- [ ] STATUS.md contract in plain English
- [ ] Direct entry protocol handles missing SESH.md
- [ ] Re-entry protocol handles populated section

- [ ] Refusal conditions explicit
